name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
text: PM Kisan scheme provides ₹6000 per year to small and marginal farmers. Eligibility includes land ownership. Documents required: Aadhaar, land records. Category: Agriculture.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
text: Crop Insurance Scheme provides financial protection to farmers against crop loss due to natural disasters. Eligibility: farmers. Documents: Aadhaar, land details. Category: Agriculture.

name: Ayushman Bharat Yojana
text: Provides free health insurance up to ₹5 lakh for low-income families. Eligibility: economically weaker sections. Documents: Aadhaar, ration card. Category: Health.

name: PM Awas Yojana
text: Provides affordable housing for urban and rural poor. Eligibility: low-income families without permanent house. Documents: Aadhaar, income proof. Category: Housing.

name: National Scholarship Portal
text: Provides scholarships for students from low-income families. Eligibility: students with financial need. Documents: income certificate, academic records. Category: Education.

name: Stand Up India Scheme
text: Provides loans to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for starting businesses. Eligibility: women and SC/ST entrepreneurs. Documents: Aadhaar, business plan. Category: Business.

name: Startup India Scheme
text: Supports startups with funding, tax benefits, and mentorship. Eligibility: new entrepreneurs. Documents: business registration. Category: Business.

name: MGNREGA
text: Provides 100 days of wage employment to rural households. Eligibility: rural citizens. Documents: job card, Aadhaar. Category: Employment.

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
text: Provides free LPG connections to women from below poverty line families. Eligibility: BPL women. Documents: Aadhaar, ration card. Category: Welfare.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
text: Provides pension benefits to workers in unorganized sectors. Eligibility: citizens aged 18-40. Documents: Aadhaar, bank account. Category: Pension.

name: PM Mudra Yojana
text: Provides loans up to ₹10 lakh for small businesses. Eligibility: small entrepreneurs. Documents: Aadhaar, business details. Category: Finance.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
text: Promotes education and welfare of girl children. Eligibility: girl children and families. Documents: birth certificate. Category: Social Welfare.

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
text: Provides skill development training for youth. Eligibility: unemployed youth. Documents: Aadhaar. Category: Skill Development.

name: National Social Assistance Programme
text: Provides financial assistance to elderly, widows, and disabled persons. Eligibility: vulnerable groups. Documents: Aadhaar, income proof. Category: Welfare.

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
text: Provides life insurance coverage at low premium. Eligibility: citizens aged 18-50. Documents: Aadhaar, bank account. Category: Insurance.

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
text: Provides accident insurance coverage. Eligibility: citizens aged 18-70. Documents: Aadhaar. Category: Insurance.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
text: Provides skill training and employment opportunities for rural youth. Eligibility: rural youth. Documents: Aadhaar. Category: Skill Development.

name: Digital India Programme
text: Promotes digital literacy and access to online services. Eligibility: all citizens. Documents: Aadhaar. Category: Digital.

name: PM SVANidhi Yojana
text: Provides loans to street vendors for business. Eligibility: street vendors. Documents: Aadhaar, vendor ID. Category: Business.

name: National Food Security Act
text: Provides subsidized food grains to low-income families. Eligibility: BPL households. Documents: ration card. Category: Food Security.
